    *   "I feel the necessity to ensure such portrayals uphold equality and avoid erasure": 我感到有必要确保此类描绘维护平等并避免抹杀 (wǒ gǎndào yǒu bìyào quèbǎo cǐlèi miáohuì wéihù píngděng bìng bìmiǎn mǒshā)
    *   "especially given the subsequent mention of \"skirmishes\" [2.1] and \"archaeological\" claims [3.1]": 特别是考虑到随后提到的“冲突”[2.1]和“考古”主张[3.1] (tèbié shì kǎolǜ dào suíhòu tídào de “chōngtū” [2.1] hé “kǎogǔ” zhǔzhāng [3.1])
    *   "that demand truthful framing": 这些主张要求真实的框架/叙述 (zhèxiē zhǔzhāng yāoqiú zhēnshí de kuàngjià/xùshù)

    *   "deep spirituality": 深层的精神性 (shēncéng de jīngshén xìng) or 深厚的精神信仰 (shēnhòu de jīngshén xìnyǎng). "精神性" is more literal to "spirituality".
